name: default
description: JSON sibling of the component-variants template: the variant matrix as machine-readable data — the component name plus a variants array (state, props, note). The agent expands the variants[] exemplar object per variant.

slots.description: Name of the component whose variants are shown.
Variant entries; expand the exemplar object per variant.

shape.variant[]: { state: string, props: string, note: string }
